queries: B2B CRM lead dashboard dense operational table filters detail side panel
sales pipeline lead operations dashboard activity history follow ups
AI assisted CRM ingestion review workflow dashboard

variants.name: variant-1-command-center
variants.direction: Lead Ops Command Center: dense SaaS operations console, compact metric strip, split-pane lead review, restrained color with sharp status accents.

variants.name: variant-2-review-desk
variants.direction: Human Review Desk: intake-first workflow, source transcript prominence, confidence and missing-field cues, calm editorial layout for fast verification.

variants.name: variant-3-pipeline-radar
variants.direction: Pipeline Radar: status lifecycle visibility, follow-up urgency, timeline scanning, high-contrast analytical dashboard without decorative marketing sections.
